input.prompt:
My .NET MAUI page shows blank labels even though my ViewModel properties
have values. Here is my XAML:
```xml
<ContentPage xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/dotnet/2021/maui"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2009/xaml">
    <VerticalStackLayout>
        <Label Text="{Binding Title}" />
        <Label Text="{Binding Description}" />
    </VerticalStackLayout>
</ContentPage>
```
What am I doing wrong?

input.initialPrompt:
My .NET MAUI page shows blank labels even though my ViewModel properties
have values. Here is my XAML:
```xml
<ContentPage xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/dotnet/2021/maui"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2009/xaml">
    <VerticalStackLayout>
        <Label Text="{Binding Title}" />
        <Label Text="{Binding Description}" />
    </VerticalStackLayout>
</ContentPage>
```
What am I doing wrong?

data.content:
Your `BindingContext` is never set, so the bindings have no source. You need to assign your ViewModel to the page's `BindingContext`. For example, in code-behind:

```csharp
public MainPage()
{
    InitializeComponent();
    BindingContext = new MyViewModel();
}
```

Or via XAML:

```xml
<ContentPage xmlns:vm="clr-namespace:MyApp.ViewModels"
             ...>
    <ContentPage.BindingContext>
        <vm:MyViewModel />
    </ContentPage.BindingContext>
    ...
</ContentPage>
```

Also ensure your ViewModel raises `PropertyChanged` when property values change (implement `INotifyPropertyChanged` or inherit from `ObservableObject` in the MVVM Community Toolkit).
data.reasoningText:
The user is asking about a common .NET MAUI data binding issue. The labels are blank despite the ViewModel having values. Looking at the XAML, the most likely issue is that the `BindingContext` is never set.

But there could also be a second issue: the ViewModel properties may not implement `INotifyPropertyChanged`, so the UI wouldn't update when values change.

The most obvious problem from the XAML alone: there's no `BindingContext` being set. Let me give a concise answer.
